---
name: Question about using Ragapp/Ragapp Apps
about: This is not the appropriate channel
labels: invalid
---

Please post on our forums:

for questions about using the `Ragapp Framework`: ~~https://discuss.ragapp.khulnasoft.com~~ => [stackoverflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/ragapp) tagged under `ragapp`

for questions about using `NxERP`: https://discuss.erpnext.com

for questions about using `cli`, probably the best place to start is the [cli repo](https://github.com/khulnasoft/cli)

For documentation issues, use the [Ragapp Framework Documentation](https://ragapp.khulnasoft.com/docs) or the [developer cheetsheet](https://github.com/khulnasoft/ragapp/wiki/Developer-Cheatsheet)

For a slightly outdated yet informative developer guide: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3lFfCEoMxvzHtsZHFJ4T3n5yMM3nGJ1W

> **Posts that are not bug reports or feature requests will not be addressed on this issue tracker.**
